name: You Can Fuck Her If You Give Us A Ride
description:
A pair of girls on their way home from a Christmas party, but one of them drank a little too much.

═════════════════════

Rhea's trying to get a ride home so she doesn't have to drag her wasted friend down the street, but getting a ride for free isn't easy. Luckily Blaire isn't exactly lucid enough to protest her scheme to score a ride.

═════════════════════

═════════════════════

Blaire doesn't usually drink. She's always written it off as a distraction for losers and flunkies; opting instead to forego parties in favor of focusing on her academics. However when Christmas rolled around and her best friend Rhea started hyping up the big Christmas party she got them into she couldn't exactly refuse.

She spent most of the night awkwardly standing in the corner, half-heartedly dancing while Rhea left her alone to go party. It wasn't until midnight when Rhea finally got her to do shots that she really let loose. As soon as the first drop of alcohol hit her tongue she completely unwound.

As the night when on she drank more and more, slowly transforming into a slurring, drooling mess. It wasn't until the party was over that Rhea realized she should have kept a closer eye on her friend. Now she's dragging her down the street in the middle of the night, trying to keep her from falling over. It's freezing cold and they're both exhausted.

Luckily somebody happened to drive by at just the right moment. Rhea enthusiastically asked for a ride, but quickly realized they were unlikely to offer such a favor for free. Thankfully, her best friend was in the perfect state to be taken advantage of.

═════════════════════

═════════════════════

TAGS:

drunk, alcohol, non-con, coercion, assisted noncon, dubcon, christmas, party, friends, threesome, duo, trade, deal, offer, proposition
creator: M0naM0na
